name: MADELUNG DISEASE
definition: BENIGN SYMMETRICAL LIPOMATOSIS = MULTIPLE SYMMETRIC LIPOMATOSIS rare benign condition characterized by symmetric proliferation of adipose tissue

demographics.Location: head, neck, shoulders (periscapular), upper chest; NO involvement of anterior

distribution: head, neck, shoulders (periscapular), upper chest; NO involvement of anterior

clinical.Cx: respiratory compromise ← tracheal compression at neck
